case_title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES VS. DAVID TEHERO

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES SERVED AUG-31-2015, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT TEHERO, DAVID
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY (CCP 585(4)) RE: LOSS OF ORIGINAL LEASE EVID. CODE 1501, 1551 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEHERO, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 150 OTIS STREET, #404, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94103, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
